name: queueRetry
_note: Retries a queued store-and-forward frame from per-user STATE keyed by ctx.actor.userId. An unknown/missing frameId fails-closed with 'frame not found' (NEVER no_db). When the destination node is online, the frame is delivered + dequeued and the underlying message flips to delivered; otherwise it stays pending with attempts incremented. The assassin's owner actor has no queued frames.
